summary: Fantastic intimate show captured in an unknown‑quality recording
review: The reviewer, who attended the concert at a small Binghamton University arena, calls it a fantastic performance and even got Jerry’s autograph after the show. No specific comments on the audio source are provided, so the technical quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the concert heavily; recording quality is unknown, so rating leans on show strength with modest confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Positive energy in a small arena; reviewers highlight the intimate atmosphere rather than specific set details.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer mentions meeting Jerry after the show and getting his autograph.
